overallInterpretation: Interactive tilemap demo with HUD, tile painting, carve mode, debug overlays. Carving produces collision edges via marching squares. Known limitation: tile meshes not visually updated after carving (follow-up ticket created).

artifacts.interpretation: 12x12 green tile grid with HUD and debug overlays
HUD shows tile type changed, painting functional
Carve mode active, collision edges visible, chunk allocated
